subcodes.first_line: O Hudhud! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken with thy heart's ear unto the Voice of the Wronged One, and with the eye of truth gaze thou upon His signs [3.5s]... ...Purity and chastity have been, and still are, the most great ornaments for the handmaidens of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا هدهد علیک بهائی ندای مظلوم را بگوش قلب بشنو و در آثارش بچشم حقیقت نظر نما
subcodes.subjects: @chastity and purity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @living waters; water of life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
